features: Fights tough odours trapped in fabrics
Up to 24 hours of freshness on fabrics
Febreze Fabric Refresher is dermatologically tested, safe to use around cats and dogs
Safe to use on most fabrics
description: Product Description Febreze Fabric Freshener Spray with 2X ACTION fights odours and freshens. It doesn't just mask odours; it truly fights tough odours trapped in fabrics, leaving behind a fresh scent that lasts up to 24 hours on fabrics. Love your pets, not their odours. Febreze Pet Fresh Scent transports you to a serene retreat filled with lush greens and glistening waters. Bursting with zesty green citrus and juicy pear notes, it brings vibrant energy to your space. Delicate blooms of jasmine, violet, and tuberose create a harmonious floral symphony, while a whisper of creamy musk gently envelops the room. This refreshing scent transforms your home into a tranquil sanctuary for both you and your beloved pets, celebrating their joy while keeping your environment fresh. Febreze Fabric Refresher is ideal for hard-to-wash items like sofa coverings, curtains, and carpets. It also freshens up clothes, towels, and linens between washes. Febreze Fabric Refresher is dermatologically tested and safe to use around cats and dogs. Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP
